TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Gurbanguly_Berdimuhamedow, title = Gurbanguly_Berdimuhamedow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gurbanguly_Berdimuhamedow} }

S.FORM: I 1957 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Turkmenistan anini i ci Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~u~urb~b~vaŇčo~u~u…ĺj b~b~v…ôr…¨~…ģimo~u~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģo~uw , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~urkm…ônistan anini i ¶i *o~u~urb~b~vaŇčo~u~u…ĺj b~b~v…ôr…¨~…ģimo~u~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģo~uw, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1957 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Turkmenistan anini i ci Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~u~urb~b~vaŇčo~u~u…ĺj b~b~v…ôr…¨~…ģimo~u~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģo~uw , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~urkm…ônistan anini i ¶i *o~u~urb~b~vaŇčo~u~u…ĺj b~b~v…ôr…¨~…ģimo~u~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģo~uw, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
